title: More Varients
description: A Simple Vannila Friendly Mod Has New Blocks
body:
# **_More Varients_**

(*_Yes the spelling is intentional_*)

![More Varients ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21007b2d3ec03e5ae68b3ebc207913b957f2a50a.png)

A simple vanilla friendly mod that adds--->

*1. **Blocks**|_Granite Bricks
          |Diorite Bricks
          |Andesite Bricks
          |Cracked Polished 
          |Chipped Log_
          etc...

![Chipped Variants For All Overworld Logs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c23af9caa4b2dcf8ce90788d6c5faf721562fe9.png)
          
*2. **Stairs**|_Concrete Stairs
          |TerracottaStairs
          |Thatched Stairs
          etc..._

![More Stairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46c5e30c21aafdbf9982bf78b53a75e5934ad521.png)
![More ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd7e9d2bc9a3bc862a399024b62d3d2fedf4ff80.png)
          
*3. **Slabs**|_Concrete Slabs
         |Terracotta Slabs
         |Thatched Slab
         etc..._

*4. **Wool**|_Frost Pattern_
![Frost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65705ac8c94d96b51e4e7e4d67f0778547e16136.png)
         
This Mod Aims To Aid Builders in Providing More Creative Freedom by adding more decoration variants each with new and unique textures(mostly).
This mod currently has around 150+ blocks and I am working on adding new ones each update.

This Mod is still my first one so any advice, ideas and criticism are openly welcomed.

Mod is Also Available on CurseForge.

-ChekMate80💯
